@startuml skinparam sequenceDiagram participant Player participant Turn participant TrainsDeck participant RoutesDeck participant Track participant Route Note over Player, Turn: Created with plantuml ttr.uml
Cf. http://plantuml.com/sequence.html actor Player actor Turn actor TrainsDeck actor RoutesDeck actor Track actor Route Start Note over Player, Turn: Draw Train Cards, OR Player ->> Turn: Start Turn ->> TrainsDeck: 1 Draw Cards TrainsDeck ->> Player: 2 Cards Drawn Draw Route Cards, OR Turn ->> RoutesDeck: 1 Draw Cards RoutesDeck ->> Player: 2 Cards Drawn Build Track Turn ->> Track: 1 Build Track ->> Player: 2 Add Completed By Track ->> Route: 3 Completed? Route ->> Player: 4 Add Completed By @enduml
